command_matrix.smoke_backend: .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest tests\test_response_composer_reasoning.py tests\test_phase2_routing_safety.py tests\test_phase32_cli_client.py tests\test_phase32_cli_commands.py tests\test_phase32_cli_redaction.py tests\test_phase32_cli_server_manager.py tests\test_phase32_cli_sse.py apps\local-api\tests\test_config.py apps\local-api\tests\test_db_migrations.py apps\local-api\tests\test_chat_trace_error.py

items.current_behavior: Intent, mode, and context decisions are deterministic rule-first with model_hint captured but disabled by default.
items.why_accepted: Optional model-assisted triage is reserved as a seam; no extra model classification call is required in local no-model environments.
mitigation: decision preview returns model_hint.enabled=false
low confidence falls back to safe clarification or direct response

items.current_behavior: Phase 29 provides local CI-ready check profiles and release-scale evidence, but does not add a hosted CI provider workflow.
items.why_accepted: Hosted CI and multi-platform runners must call the same local profiles in a future environment-specific integration.
mitigation: check.ps1 supports full, fast, api, security and release profiles
release report includes phase29 release-scale evidence
accepted risk lifecycle marks missing hosted CI as unexpired

items.current_behavior: conversation working state, clarification, and Phase 18 dialogue semantics use deterministic rules
items.why_accepted: Dialogue semantics are implemented as rule-first extraction; future model-assisted review can improve ambiguous wording quality.
mitigation: working state table is populated
ambiguous high-risk action asks 1-3 clarification questions
dialogue state and semantic intent evidence are persisted

items.current_behavior: Chat main-chain acceptance uses deterministic local smoke/evidence checks over eval, trace, replay, response, and safety records.
items.why_accepted: It does not replace large-scale real-user experience evaluation or long-horizon model-assisted conversation assessment.
mitigation: phase17 suite is registered
release report contains phase17 go/no-go evidence
zero-tolerance chat security failures block release

items.current_behavior: local_hash_v1 remains the default active fallback; local_model and Chroma can become active only when healthy, while external-compatible embedding is disabled unless cloud use, secret_ref, and privacy checks pass.
items.why_accepted: Real high-quality embedding evaluation still depends on an operator-provided local model or explicit external-compatible provider; default local checks remain deterministic smoke coverage.
mitigation: external provider is disabled by default
provider status exposes privacy_policy, allow_cloud, and health
high privacy or sensitive text blocks external embedding
embedding traces do not store raw text

items.current_behavior: stdio MCP uses runtime profiles, lifecycle/protocol validation, env_refs-only policy, untrusted content sanitization and taint records.
items.why_accepted: OS process boundary is local stdio; policy is stored per server.
mitigation: unsafe stdio commands are rejected
member scope policy blocks unauthorized tool calls
protocol invalid responses degrade safely
MCP output taint cannot bypass high-risk approvals

items.current_behavior: Phase 24 implements semantic review request/suggestion/model-call/merge evidence and stable fallback; no real model call runs unless an allowed local verifier adapter is configured.
items.why_accepted: Real model semantic quality still needs local-model/CI evaluation; the current backend contract is advisory, schema-bound, and fallback-first.
mitigation: semantic review writes fallback evidence without a configured model
decision preview has no semantic review persistence side effects
risk monotonic guard blocks unsafe downgrade suggestions

items.current_behavior: Model-assisted semantic verifier service is implemented with fake/disabled adapter seams and deterministic fallback; external/cloud model use is not enabled by default.
items.why_accepted: Large-scale ambiguous dialogue quality must be rechecked once a real local model adapter is configured.
mitigation: ModelAssistedVerifier contract is implemented_with_fallback
invalid JSON and timeout fallback keep the chat path stable
high privacy forces local_only review policy

items.current_behavior: Phase 25 supports configured-brain model candidate generation, quality scoring, observation-aware replanning and recovery evidence; local tests still use deterministic fake/fallback adapters.
items.why_accepted: Real planner quality depends on a configured local/allowed model and future CI quality gates; model candidates remain candidate-only and still route through Safety, Approval, Asset Broker, Capability Graph, Skill, MCP and ToolRuntime.
mitigation: model planner records fallback evidence without a configured model
fake model candidates are verified, pruned and quality scored
candidate plans are verified and pruned before execution
agent loop remains bounded and replayable with observation-aware deltas

items.current_behavior: Windows Job Object is the first real OS backend; if unavailable, TerminalSandboxRunner falls back to policy_guard and records the reason.
items.why_accepted: Job Object limits process lifetime and resources but does not provide full filesystem virtualization or low-integrity token isolation.
mitigation: TerminalRunner contract is implemented_with_fallback
OSLevelSandbox contract is implemented_with_fallback
terminal sandbox profile records windows_job_object or policy_guard

items.current_behavior: Persona/Heart replay uses deterministic local cases and persisted quality evidence.
items.why_accepted: It does not represent large-scale real-user longitudinal experience or model-assisted psychological interpretation.
mitigation: replay runs store pass/fail evidence
high-risk tone keeps anthropomorphic level low
quality scans block internal leakage

items.current_behavior: Phase 49 records deterministic closure evidence locally and treats real-model runner full PASS as a release-profile requirement.
items.why_accepted: Real model availability, provider credentials and long runner duration remain environment-specific, so default full checks do not require them.
mitigation: suite_phase49_release_closure is required and passes deterministic evidence checks
release report includes summary.phase49 real model smoke and quality runner matrix
production chat paths are scanned for test case-id fixed replies
accepted risk closure registry lists owner phase and promotion rule

items.current_behavior: Phase 31 keeps the default full profile deterministic and requires the real chat runner full PASS only in the release profile.
items.why_accepted: Real model E2E runs are slower and environment-dependent, so hosted CI and model availability validation remain future release infrastructure work.
mitigation: check.ps1 -Profile release runs the real chat runner matrix
release report includes summary.phase31
default check.ps1 remains deterministic and stable

items.current_behavior: release gate runs local eval/security/integrity/backup smoke evidence
items.why_accepted: Evidence chain is stronger than smoke but still local and small-scale.
mitigation: release gate references phase10 evidence and blocks leaks

items.current_behavior: terminal.run uses a TerminalSandboxRunner; Windows prefers Job Object, other environments fall back to policy_guard with persisted evidence.
items.why_accepted: Low-integrity token, full filesystem virtualization, and container isolation are not enabled by default in Phase 27.
mitigation: custom cwd is rejected
secret/system paths are denied
Windows Job Object or explicit fallback is recorded
terminal logs are redacted artifacts

items.current_behavior: Local deterministic vector provider is active; FTS remains an explicit fallback when semantic hits are insufficient
items.why_accepted: Semantic retrieval uses deterministic local embeddings by default; optional local_model, Chroma, and external-compatible providers require explicit health/privacy validation before becoming active.
mitigation: local vector provider is available without external dependencies
memory and knowledge retrieval distinguish semantic hits from FTS fallback
provider failures fall back to local_hash_v1 without deleting old indexes

items.current_behavior: Phase 23 records local deterministic ruff, mypy, pytest, eval, release, and diagnostic evidence.
items.why_accepted: Local verification is not a substitute for hosted CI, multi-platform runs, or long-duration load testing.
mitigation: check.ps1 writes a local check report
release report includes phase23
diagnostic bundle includes accepted risk registry

CHAT-E2E-FIX-001.root_cause: memory_correction skipped explicit memory command direct path
CHAT-E2E-FIX-001.expected_fix: memory_correction turn completes via direct path

CHAT-E2E-FIX-002.root_cause: correction event was emitted only when an old memory was superseded

CHAT-E2E-FIX-003.root_cause: persona boundary text matched tool markers before boundary rules
CHAT-E2E-FIX-003.expected_fix: persona boundary remains direct and does not create task

CHAT-E2E-FIX-004.root_cause: research/report requests were classified as ordinary direct chat
CHAT-E2E-FIX-004.expected_fix: real research/report request enters controlled task chain
